feature_name: Close mobile task shelf on ALL action button taps, not just star

completed_tasks.title: Add closeActions() to all four handlers and write tests
completed_tasks.description: In TaskRow.svelte, add a closeActions() call at the end of toggleStar, punt, addTomorrow, and addNextWeek. Write unit tests for all four handlers asserting showActions === false after the action fires (plus regression tests for deleteTask and openDetailFromMenu). Write one Playwright @smoke E2E test for the Star action's shelf-close behavior. Run all quality gates and fix any failures.
completed_tasks.done_when: All four handlers call closeActions(), unit tests pass for all six action handlers, E2E smoke test passes for Star shelf-close, all quality gates green.

history.note: Feature initiated: star button in TaskRow quick-actions shelf should close the shelf after toggling star, matching behavior of other actions that visually dismiss the task
Scope expanded: close shelf on ALL action button taps (punt/tomorrow/next-week/star), not just star. Routed to product-manager for requirements.
Requirements artifact confirmed. Routed to principal-engineer for design.
Task breakdown: single task T1 covering all four closeActions() additions, unit tests, and E2E smoke test.
Starting T1: add closeActions() to toggleStar, punt, addTomorrow, addNextWeek + unit tests + E2E smoke.

T1 complete. All four handlers now call closeActions(). Unit tests (7) and E2E smoke test added. Fixed two pre-existing myday E2E tests that assumed shelf stayed open after Star. All quality gates green.
All tasks complete. Routed to quality-assurance for code review.
QA returned REQUEST CHANGES. CRITICAL: TaskRow.test.ts is untracked and must be staged for commit/PR/CI. Routing to SDE for fix pass.
All tasks complete. Routed to build-specialist for full quality gate verification.
All tasks in completed_tasks. Routed to product-manager for acceptance validation against criteria.
Feature complete. Exec plan moved to completed/. All 9 acceptance criteria passed. No tech debt created.
